items.definition_en: An ancestor is someone in your family who lived long ago.
items.example_en: She likes to research her ancestors online.

items.definition_en: A descendant is a person who is related to someone from a previous generation.
items.example_en: He is a descendant of a famous writer.

items.definition_en: Upbringing is the way children are raised by their parents.
items.example_en: She credits her success to her strict upbringing.

items.definition_en: Lineage refers to a person's family history or ancestry.
items.example_en: They can trace their lineage back hundreds of years.

items.definition_en: Heritage means the traditions and values passed down in a family.
items.example_en: He is proud of his cultural heritage.

items.definition_en: Sibling is a brother or sister.
items.example_en: My sister is always there for me.

items.definition_en: A foster parent cares for a child who is not their own by birth.
items.example_en: He lived with a foster parent for two years.

items.definition_en: A godparent is an adult chosen to help guide a child spiritually.
items.example_en: She chose her best friend as her son's godparent.

items.definition_en: Great grandfather is a grandfather's father.
items.example_en: My great grandfather is a doctor.

items.definition_en: A goddaughter is a daughter of a godparent.
items.example_en: My goddaughter is having a birthday party next week.
